calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For An Order Designating Successor Custodian Under The California Uniform Transfers To Minors Act
Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Riordan Sykes, via ZOOM, for Thomas Tsui-Ming Ngai, Petitioner.

The court addresses the potential venue issue. The court advises counsel that after having reviewed the supplemental declaration filed in support of this being proper venue, it is satisfied that venue is proper. The court asks if there are any objections to this petition. None are presented.

The Petition for an Order Designating Successor Custodian, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For An Order Designating Successor Custodian Under The California Uniform Transfers To Minors Act
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Continued To Dec-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
